texto: There's a time in your life when you have to stop looking back and start looking forward because otherwise you're going to walk down the road one day and bump into a lamppost. But it's not easy.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Anna Maxted sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “There's a time in your life when you have to stop looking back and start looking forward because …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, regret, looking, útil em momentos de viagem e regret.
